title: E2E for supported device page and color theme flow
scenario: First-launch onboarding flow and color theme page navigation E2E test on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Clear app data / reinstall Poly Studio Mobile to trigger first-launch onboarding.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Accept the Notifications dialog when prompted.
4. Accept the EULA (End User License Agreement).
5. Verify the Welcome page displays: correct header text and a "Continue as Guest" button.
6. Tap "Continue as Guest".
7. Accept the PPIP "Share Data" prompt.
8. Allow Location Access when prompted.
9. Navigate through the onboarding screens: tap "Get Started", then "Skip", then "Continue" as each screen appears.
10. Observe the Home screen — verify the "No Device Connected" page is displayed.
11. Tap to select a device and verify the device selection flow works.
12. Tap the back navigation button to return to the previous screen.
13. Open the main menu (hamburger menu or menu icon).
14. Navigate to the Color Theme page from the main menu.
15. Verify the Color Theme page displays: correct header and a "Follow Phone Theme" button.
16. Navigate back to the main menu.
17. Open the General menu and select About.
18. Verify the About page displays "Poly Studio is up to date".
19. Tap the back navigation button to return to the Home screen.
20. Verify the Home screen shows the "No Device Connected" page again.
expected: All onboarding screens display correctly with proper UI elements. User can complete the full onboarding flow (Notifications → EULA → Welcome → PPIP → Location → Get Started → Skip → Continue). After onboarding, the Home screen shows \"No Device Connected\". Device selection flow works and back navigation returns properly. Color Theme page shows correct header and \"Follow Phone Theme\" button. About page shows \"Poly Studio is up to date\". Back navigation from About returns to the \"No Device Connected\" Home screen.
